title: [Bleeping Computer] Hackers exploit file upload bug in Breeze Cache WordPress plugin
summary: Hackers are actively exploiting a critical vulnerability in the Breeze Cache plugin for WordPress that allows uploading arbitrary files on the server without authentication. [...]

title: [Bleeping Computer] Bitwarden CLI npm package compromised to steal developer credentials
summary: The Bitwarden CLI was briefly compromised after attackers uploaded a malicious @bitwarden/cli package to npm containing a credential-stealing payload capable of spreading to other projects. [...]

title: [Bleeping Computer] Trigona ransomware attacks use custom exfiltration tool to steal data
